Community Comparison Worksheet

The trap in comparing communities is that each one quotes differently. This worksheet fixes that: the same questions, asked everywhere, side by side. Fill it in on screen as you call and tour, or and bring it with you.

Your answers stay on your device only — nothing you type here is sent or saved anywhere. Print or screenshot when you're done.

Question

How to use it well

Get the cost row from a written quote at your parent's assessed care level — never the advertised starting rate (here's why). Check every finalist's official record, use the touring checklist on each visit, and trust the last row — after everything measurable, how a place felt is real data too.

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities.
